title: Login API
text: POST /login authenticates user credentials. Valid email and password return HTTP 200 and token. Invalid credentials return HTTP 401.

title: Password reset API
text: POST /password/reset starts password recovery. User provides email and receives reset instructions.

title: Users list API
text: GET /users returns a paginated list of users. It supports page and size query parameters.

title: File upload limits
text: POST /files uploads a file. Files larger than 10MB must be rejected with HTTP 413 Payload Too Large.

title: Orders creation API
text: POST /orders creates a new delivery order and returns order identifier after validation.
